message.content:
Find the Controller class that handles the `/api/v1/node/role` endpoints in the collabspace-server project under D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server. I need:

1. The full path of the Controller file(s) related to node role management (listTeamRoles, listMemberRoles, permissionLogs, editRole, batchEditRole, addRole, deleteRole, batchDeleteRole)
2. Read the FULL content of the Controller file(s)
3. Find and read the Service/Manager implementation files that these controllers call
4. Find the request/response DTO classes (RO/VO) used by these endpoints

Be thorough - search for "NodeRole", "node/role", "listTeamRoles", "listMemberRoles", "permissionLogs", "editRole" etc. Read all relevant files completely.
